parsed_review.summary: Claude Code Opus 4.8 max read-only review completed once. It did not emit a formal severity table, and raised one unverified concern about possible title-disposition mismatch before ending. Local adjudication verified the concern against the validator and contract and rejected it as non-blocking.

findings.title: Possible title-disposition mismatch between validator and contract
findings.disposition: Rejected. RP00.P01.M07.S02 is included in alignedWithWeightedLedgerSubphases, not contractTitleAuthoritativeSubphases, and the contract records aligned_with_weighted_ledger. Final RP00 validation confirms no title-disposition mismatch.
